---
page_title: unix_timestamp_parse function reference
description: The `unix_timestamp_parse` function converts a Unix timestamp into date and time values for Packer templates.
---

# `unix_timestamp_parse` function

The `unix_timestamp_parse` function converts a Unix timestamp, in seconds, into an object
with its date and time values in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

```hcl
unix_timestamp_parse(UNIX_TIMESTAMP)
```

The function requires a whole number that fits in a signed 64-bit integer.

## Example

```hcl
locals {
  timestamp = unix_timestamp_parse(1690328596)
  rfc3339  = local.timestamp.rfc3339
}
```

The result includes the following attributes:

| Attribute | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `year` | Calendar year. |
| `year_day` | Day of the year. |
| `month` | Month number. |
| `month_name` | Full month name. |
| `day` | Day of the month. |
| `weekday` | Day of the week, where Sunday is `0`. |
| `weekday_name` | Full weekday name. |
| `hour` | Hour in 24-hour time. |
| `minute` | Minute of the hour. |
| `second` | Second of the minute. |
| `rfc3339` | RFC 3339 timestamp string. |
| `iso_year` | ISO 8601 week-numbering year. |
| `iso_week` | ISO 8601 week number. |

## Related functions

- [`rfc3339_parse`](/packer/docs/templates/hcl_templates/functions/datetime/rfc3339_parse) converts an RFC 3339 timestamp into date and time values.
- [`formatdate`](/packer/docs/templates/hcl_templates/functions/datetime/formatdate) formats an RFC 3339 timestamp string.
